name: "Bug report"
about: "Something broke. Tell us what happened."
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## > describe_bug

<!-- What went wrong? Be specific. -->

## > reproduce

```
1. Go to '...'
2. Upload image '...'
3. See error
```

## > expected_behavior

<!-- What should have happened instead? -->

## > screenshots

<!-- If applicable. A picture is worth a thousand log lines. -->

## > image_info

- **Source**: (Gemini / DALL-E / Midjourney / Stable Diffusion / Flux / other)
- **Background type**: (checkerboard / solid / complex / watermarked)
- **Dimensions**: (e.g. 1024x1024)

## > environment

- **Browser + version**: (e.g. Chrome 130)
- **OS**: (e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14)
- **WebGPU supported**: yes / no
- **Console errors**: (paste any errors from DevTools)
